title: Swordfish ‘Twin Soft Grip’ Double-Hole Pencil Sharpener [Pack of 30] Assorted Colours [40288]
features: Sharpen standard 8mm or large 10.5mm writing, colouring and art pencils with Swordfish’s Twin Soft Grip
Soft rubber edging provides a comfortable grip allowing you to sharpen for long periods of time without any unwanted discomfort
Fun ergonomic shape makes Twin Soft Grip suitable for use by young children and adults, ideal for the home and school
Inset blades and tamper-resistant screws ensure you aren’t exposed to any sharp edges and can’t easily remove blades for added safety
Available in four vibrant colours including Blue, Green, Red and Yellow
description: From the manufacturer From a small pocket sharpener to electrical machines that can sharpen 15 pencils in a minute, Swordfish are the experts. Our sharpeners have been designed to meet individual needs. Sharpeners that have their blades retained by tamper-proof screws are ideal for school kids, whilst electrical sharpeners that can handle a variety of different pencil diameters are a boon to busy teachers. We even have a fully automatic, hands-free sharpener that takes the hard work out of sharpening lots of pencils. Artists who use specialist pencils are pleased to see that we test all our mechanical and electrical sharpeners on a range of these pencils – and publish the results, taking the guesswork out of choosing the right machine. Swordfish’s Twin Soft Grip Pencil Sharpener is an essential tool for home and school. The Swordfish Twin Soft Grip has soft rubber edging for a comfortable grip, allowing you to sharpen your pencils comfortably and efficiently. The double hole pencil sharpener allows you to sharpen different diameter pencils – both 8mm and 10.5mm diameter pencils, so one sharpener is all you need. Swordfish's handy Twin Soft Grip Sharpener has unique tamper resistant screws and inset blades so no sharp edges are accessible, ensuring your safety while you sharpen away. The versatile sharpener also has an ergonomic shape, making it suitable for young children to use with ease. The Twin Soft Grip Pencil Sharpener is available in 4 stunning colours including Blue, Green, Red and Yellow, designed to suit your every need. Swordfish sharpeners have inset blades ensuring you're not exposed to any sharp edges, making them safe for children and adults. Swordfish's Pencil Sharpeners feature tamper-resistant screws, so blades cannot be removed without specialist tools for added safety. The Swordfish Pencil Sharpener features soft rubber edging for a comfortable grip, with an ergonomic shape, suitable for young children. The versatile Twin Soft Grip Sharpener has a double hole for standard 8mm and large 10.5mm diameter pencils, for all your sharpening needs.
